prompt: Use the handoff skill on the fixture repo in `evals/files/feature-update-fixture/`. Copy the repo to `outputs/repo/`. There is an existing feature-scoped handoff at `.agents/scratchpad/payments/handoff.md`; update it in place using `session_notes.md`, `reports/benchmark.txt`, `src/payment_retry.py`, and `tests/test_payment_retry.py`. Write `outputs/result.json` with `written_path`, `scope`, and `next_step`. The user says: `handoff to next agent; focus on retry metrics and docs.` Do not ask follow-up questions.
assertions: The updated handoff includes retry-metrics and docs focus.
The stale `inspect legacy YAML toggles` step is removed.
outputs/result.json reports the feature-scoped handoff path.
